REASONING: Concentrating on Hypnotic Pattern. Vicious Mockery on Frost Giant (disadvantage protects concentration).

→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:18+3=21 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Throwing rock at Aarakocra — Unarmored Caster (distant).

→ Rock: [d20:6+9=15 vs AC 15] HIT! 38 damage. Aarakocra — Unarmored Caster HP: 2/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
